notes: Global land area per AGB bin (7 hybrid bins). Hybrid scheme: fixed bin 1 (0-5 Mg/ha); bins 2-7 are equal-area quantile bins for land with biomass >= 5 Mg/ha. Quantile breakpoints (Mg/ha): q1 = 13, q2 = 27, q3 = 51, q4 = 94, q5 = 171. Vegetated land (>= 5 Mg/ha): 70,162,294 km2. Biomass raster band 18 (2024) resampled to KG 0.00833 deg grid (bilinear). KG-land pixels with NA biomass -> assigned value 0 (-> bin 1). terra::cellSize(kg_rast, mask=TRUE) + terra::zonal(fun='sum'). Total land: 147,322,862 km2 (matches KG land mask baseline 147,322,862 km2).
